The '''''Wasp''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], ''Wasp'' was part of [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']] and participated in its campaign to destroy the Rebel presence in [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

The vessel was damaged during the [[Mission to Kuras Drift|battle of Kuras Drift]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
